title: Mineral Salt Medium (MSM) for extreme acidophilic microorganisms
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"uabea","text":"Medium for growth of extreme acidophilic microorganisms. This medium does not contain trace elements. steps: 3.0 g/l (NH 4 ) 2 SO 4 3.2 g/l Na 2 SO 4 x10H 2 O 0.1 g/l KCl 0.05 g/l K 2 HPO 4 0.5 g/l MgSO 4 x7H 2 O 0.01 g/l Ca(NO 3 ) 2
30 g/l (NH 4 ) 2 SO 4 32 g/l Na 2 SO 4 x10H 2 O 1 g/l KCl 0.5 g/l K 2 HPO 4 5 g/l MgSO 4 x7H 2 O 0.1 g/l Ca(NO 3 ) 2
Add the constituents into a final volume of 1 liter of water, one at a time, dissolving before adding the next. Adjust the pH to 2.0 with sulfuric acid (and/or sodium hydroxide) Autoclave
